name: Hydrogen
description: The lightest and most abundant element in the universe.

name: Oxygen
description: A highly reactive nonmetal and oxidizing agent.

name: Sodium
bondingBehavior: Loses one electron to form ionic bonds.
description: A soft, silvery-white, highly reactive metal.

name: Chlorine
bondingBehavior: Gains one electron to form ionic or covalent bonds.
description: A yellow-green gas at room temperature, very reactive.

name: Carbon
bondingBehavior: Forms four covalent bonds, the backbone of organic chemistry.
description: The basis of all known life on Earth.
